reasoning: In late 2022, the LHCb collaboration released an updated analysis of the decays (R_K and R_K*) which previously showed a 3.1 sigma deviation from lepton flavor universality. The updated results, which included more data and better understood backgrounds, found that the measurements are perfectly consistent with the Standard Model predictions (lepton universality). Because the most compelling evidence for violation has disappeared, and no other 5-sigma evidence is on the horizon before 2026, the probability of falsification before 2026 is extremely low.
